heading: Modification of plan
label: 1193 Modification of plan
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title

children.heading: .—Modification Before Confirmation
children.label: a .—Modification Before Confirmation
children.text: The debtor may modify a plan at any time before confirmation, but may not modify the plan so that the plan as modified fails to meet the requirements of sections 1122 and 1123 of this title, with the exception of subsection (a)(8) of such section 1123. After the modification is filed with the court, the plan as modified becomes the plan.

children.heading: .—Modification After Confirmation
children.label: b .—Modification After Confirmation
children.text: If a plan has been confirmed under , the debtor may modify the plan at any time after confirmation of the plan and before substantial consummation of the plan, but may not modify the plan so that the plan as modified fails to meet the requirements of sections 1122 and 1123 of this title, with the exception of subsection (a)(8) of such section 1123. The plan, as modified under this subsection, becomes the plan only if circumstances warrant the modification and the court, after notice and a hearing, confirms the plan as modified under .section 1191(a) of this titlesection 1191(a) of this title

children.heading: .—Certain Other Modifications
children.label: c .—Certain Other Modifications
children.text: If a plan has been confirmed under , the debtor may modify the plan at any time within 3 years, or such longer time not to exceed 5 years, as fixed by the court, but may not modify the plan so that the plan as modified fails to meet the requirements of . The plan as modified under this subsection becomes the plan only if circumstances warrant such modification and the court, after notice and a hearing, confirms such plan, as modified, under .section 1191(b) of this titlesection 1191(b) of this titlesection 1191(b) of this title

children.heading: .—Holders of a Claim or Interest
children.label: d .—Holders of a Claim or Interest
children.text: If a plan has been confirmed under , any holder of a claim or interest that has accepted or rejected the plan is deemed to have accepted or rejected, as the case may be, the plan as modified, unless, within the time fixed by the court, such holder changes the previous acceptance or rejection of the holder.section 1191(a) of this title
